name: loops
description: Outbound agentic feedback loops on Telegram, run in your own agent on your own machine. tg-contacts-feedback DMs your testers, hears their @claude voice notes, ships a fix, replies. tg-comments-feedback mines @claude mentions across your chats. setup wires up your Telegram (QR login) + transcription. Open prompts + small scripts; bring your own Telegram account.
